items.statcast_observation: Salvador Perez produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 108.7 mph at a 25.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the San Francisco Giants, KC 5, SF 4. Seth Lugo led the night, working 7.0 innings with 3 earned runs, 5 strikeouts and 2 walks. Salvador Perez supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.7 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Giants Recap
